description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows Builds that runs on every push to master and github_actions branches and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs, windows-editor and windows-template, both running on a Windows environment. Each job clones the Godot repository and a module, loads a cache, sets up Python 3.x, installs SCons and required packages, compiles the project with specific flags, and uploads the build artifact.
